title: stenorrhynchos cornutum
intro: Stenorrhynchos cornutum, also known as the horned helmet orchid, is a species of orchid native to tropical Africa. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it useful in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Stenorrhynchos cornutum include treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as aiding in wound healing and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared in various herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
